oneOf.description: Emitted when the design has no infrastructure impact.
Full infra plan emitted when infrastructure changes are required.

summary.description: One paragraph: what infrastructure work is needed and why.

environment_requirements.description: Resources that must exist before the application can run.

resource.description: Name or identifier of the resource (e.g. 'orders-db', 'user-events-topic').

type.description: Resource type (e.g. 'PostgreSQL database', 'Kafka topic', 'S3 bucket', 'IAM role').

reason.description: Which component in the design document requires this resource.

manual_action_required.description: True if this resource cannot be provisioned automatically and requires manual intervention.

iac_changes.description: Infrastructure-as-code files that must be created or modified.

path.description: Relative path to the IaC file (Terraform, Helm chart, Kubernetes manifest, etc.).

action.description: Whether the file is new, changed, or removed.

description.description: One sentence describing what this IaC change provisions or removes.

cicd_changes.description: Changes required to the CI/CD pipeline.

step.description: Name or description of the pipeline step to add, change, or remove.

reason.description: One sentence explaining why this pipeline change is necessary.

secrets.description: Secrets and environment variables required by the new components.

description.description: What this secret is used for.

rotation_required.description: Whether this secret requires a rotation policy.

risks.description: Deployment risks, including changes with no defined rollback strategy.

risk.description: Description of the risk (e.g. 'schema migration is irreversible').

severity.description: Impact severity if the risk materialises.

rollback_strategy.description: How to recover if this change fails. Use 'none defined' if no strategy exists.
